creator: a.pirko@inode.at
text:
compiling silc-client fails when recode is installed.
Folowing error occurs:
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../..  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -g -Wall -finline-functions -Wno-pointer-sign -O2 -I/usr/local/include -DHAVE_SILCDEFS_H -I. -I../../.. -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4 -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/contrib -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silccore -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silccrypt -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcmath -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcutil -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcapputil -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcske -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcsftp -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcclient -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcasn1 -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/lib/silcskr -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.
 4/lib/silcvcard -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/includes -I/usr/ports/net/silc-client/work/silc-client-1.1.4/doc -I../../../src -I../../../src/core/ -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include   -DHELPDIR=\""/usr/local/share/silc/help"\" -DTHEMESDIR=\""/usr/local/etc"\"    -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -Wall -MT fe-common-core.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/fe-common-core.Tpo -c -o fe-common-core.o fe-common-core.c
In file included from fe-common-core.c:35:
